genre_refs: National Geographic 'To Catch a Smuggler' (TV series)
description: Television promo graphic (square format) for the National Geographic series 'To Catch a Smuggler', co-promoted by ICE. The central photograph shows a law-enforcement officer seen from behind, wearing a dark ball cap, jacket and jeans, standing in what looks like an airport or transit terminal, holding the leash of a black detection K-9 (a Belgian Malinois in a 'SECURITY' harness) at his side. Overlaid around the figure on a desaturated teal-tinted background are bright yellow rounded-square pictogram icons (directional arrows, an airplane, a briefcase, a passport, a train). A bright yellow text box across the center carries the bold dark title 'TO CATCH A SMUGGLER'. Below in yellow and white: 'NEW EPISODES / WEDS 9/8c' and the 'NATIONAL GEOGRAPHIC' logo (yellow rectangle wordmark). Fine print at bottom right: '(c)2025 National Geographic Partners, LLC.'
notable_text: TO CATCH A SMUGGLER; NEW EPISODES WEDS 9/8c; NATIONAL GEOGRAPHIC; (c)2025 National Geographic Partners, LLC.
